## **2.3.3 ATCO Planning 1**

### **Additional comments**

The number of ATCO in OPS turned out lower than expected, mainly reflecting a significantly weaker succession rate for our trainees than expected. Meanwhile, successful postponements of pension schemes lead to slightly fewer ATCO in OPS that stopped working in the OPS room.

### **Additional comments**

\-

### **Description of the training process, including details on the effective failure rate and the process used to allocate newly qualified ATCOs between ACC, APP and TWR positions**

While expectations were of an effective failure rate of 20%, the realized failure rate was closer to 60%.
